positive: A whimsical and detailed illustration of a friendly astronaut puppy floating through a celestial nebula. The puppy has a determined, cheerful expression and is wearing a stylized, retro-futuristic spacesuit with gold accents. Surrounding the puppy are stylized planetoids, geometric constellations, and floating, bioluminescent flora. The composition is centered, with a strong, clean silhouette against the deep space backdrop. Use a vibrant color palette of cosmic blues, deep purples, vivid turquoise, and pops of gold. Highly stylized, vector-pop art aesthetic, suitable for screen printing, clean lines, flat shading with gradient accents, digital illustration, high contrast, cosmic wonder.
